title: phyllanthus fractiflexus
intro: Phyllanthus fractiflexus is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the flexile leaf tree or the flexible leaf tree. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus fractiflexus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications for skin conditions like eczema and acne.
